profile.name: Marwan Ahmad
profile.role: Commissioner for Works and Housing, Kano State

hero.headline: Infrastructure Systems. Engineered for Performance.
hero.subheadline: A civil engineer and public-sector leader advancing road infrastructure, housing development, and institutional delivery systems in Kano State.
hero.positioning_line: Infrastructure Technocrat. Structural Engineer. Public Sector Leader.

portrait.alt: Official portrait of Engr. Marwan Ahmad

executive_summary.title: Executive Summary
executive_summary.summary:
Engr. Marwan Ahmad is a civil engineer and public infrastructure leader serving as Commissioner for Works and Housing in Kano State. His work is centered on strengthening the planning, delivery, and long-term performance of road and housing infrastructure systems.

With experience spanning federal engineering operations, private-sector consulting, and government advisory roles, he brings a structured, execution-focused approach to public works. His leadership emphasizes engineering discipline, project accountability, and the integration of technical standards into governance processes.

Since his appointment in 2023, the ministry's focus has included rehabilitation of critical road networks, expansion of housing infrastructure, and the improvement of project oversight mechanisms to enhance delivery efficiency and public value.
points: B.Eng Civil Engineering, Bayero University Kano
M.Sc Structural Engineering, Ahmadu Bello University
Former Project Engineer, Federal Ministry of Works
Former Managing Director, M. Ahmad Consults Ltd

biography.title: Biography & Professional Journey
biography.summary: From technical engineering practice to cabinet-level public service, Engr. Marwan Ahmad's career reflects progressive responsibility across project delivery, advisory strategy, and institutional leadership.
points: Project Engineer, Federal Ministry of Works, with exposure to standards-based public infrastructure execution
Managing Director, M. Ahmad Consults Ltd, leading private-sector engineering and delivery advisory services
Technical Adviser on Roads & Bridges to Kano State Government, supporting policy-to-project alignment
Infrastructure policy consultant on development-related projects with cross-sector implementation focus
Appointed Commissioner for Works and Housing in 2023 to oversee strategic roads and housing delivery

leadership.title: Leadership Profile
leadership.summary: His leadership approach is systems-oriented and performance-driven, with emphasis on engineering standards, accountable delivery, and institutional resilience.
leadership.leadership_thesis: Engineering discipline, execution accountability, and institutional strengthening define his leadership approach to public infrastructure delivery.
points: Establish clear technical baselines before procurement and execution
Embed accountability checkpoints across planning, delivery, and handover
Strengthen institutions through systems, standards, and performance monitoring

quotes.text: Public infrastructure must be delivered with engineering rigor and public accountability.

vision.title: Vision for Infrastructure & Housing
vision.summary: A resilient and inclusive infrastructure ecosystem that supports mobility, housing access, and long-term economic competitiveness.
points: Scale resilient road and bridge rehabilitation

contact.title: Closing / Contact
contact.summary: Partnerships are welcome with institutions aligned to durable and measurable infrastructure impact.
contact.office: Office of the Commissioner for Works and Housing, Kano State

projects.name: Metropolitan Arterial Roads Rehabilitation Program
projects.scope: Rehabilitation and widening of priority corridors with drainage and safety upgrades.
projects.impact: Improved intra-city mobility and access to commercial activity zones.

projects.name: State Priority Bridges (Dan-agundi Interchange)
projects.scope: Structural reinforcement, deck repairs, and hydraulic protection works.
projects.impact: Improved safety and all-season logistics connectivity.

projects.name: Regional Housing Estates Enablement Program
projects.scope: Site servicing works including access roads, drainage channels, and utility corridor preparation for new housing clusters.
projects.impact: Expanded housing delivery readiness and improved infrastructure access for emerging residential corridors.

metrics.name: Serviced estate zones
metrics.confidence_note: Pending final utility-connection confirmation for one site.

projects.name: Urban Drainage Resilience Corridors
projects.scope: Rehabilitation of trunk drainage alignments and integration with corridor road rehabilitation packages.
projects.impact: Reduced seasonal flooding pressure and protected critical transport links.

metrics.name: Drainage corridors upgraded
metrics.confidence_note: Under reconciliation with district-level engineer submissions.

projects.name: Strategic Interchange Upgrade Package
projects.scope: Junction redesign, pavement strengthening, and traffic-flow channelization at high-volume interchange points.
projects.impact: Improved network throughput at major urban junctions and reduced peak-hour bottlenecks.

images.caption: Interchange lane optimization and pavement upgrades

projects.name: Rural Access Link Rehabilitation
projects.scope: Targeted rehabilitation of feeder links connecting farm production areas to market corridors.
projects.impact: Enhanced market access reliability and reduced transport stress for agricultural producers.

images.caption: Rehabilitated feeder road segment in rural district

metrics.name: Feeder links rehabilitated
metrics.confidence_note: Independent verification of final 8 km is pending.

media_mentions.title: Kano Expands Road Rehabilitation Under Commissioner Ahmad
Policy Dialogue on Infrastructure Delivery in Northern Nigeria

priorities.title: Road Network Rehabilitation
priorities.description: Prioritize high-impact corridors to reduce travel time and logistics costs.

priorities.title: Housing Enablement
priorities.description: Scale serviced plots and utility-ready housing growth zones.

priorities.title: Project Quality & Governance
priorities.description: Institutionalize QA/QC and transparent delivery tracking.

modernization_opportunities.title: Project Tracking Systems
modernization_opportunities.description: Structured milestone tracking with geo-tagged field evidence and standardized progress controls.
modernization_opportunities.expected_benefit: Improves delivery predictability and early issue identification across active infrastructure projects.

modernization_opportunities.title: Executive Dashboard Capability
modernization_opportunities.description: Portfolio-level dashboard views for schedule, budget, and quality oversight at executive decision points.
modernization_opportunities.expected_benefit: Supports evidence-based leadership review and faster cross-program coordination.

modernization_opportunities.title: Digital Documentation Framework
modernization_opportunities.description: Digitized documentation lifecycle for designs, approvals, site instructions, and completion records.
modernization_opportunities.expected_benefit: Strengthens institutional memory, compliance confidence, and continuity across project teams.

modernization_opportunities.title: Transparency and Public Reporting Systems
modernization_opportunities.description: Structured disclosure workflows for selected project milestones, outputs, and accountability indicators.
modernization_opportunities.expected_benefit: Enhances public trust through clear, timely, and auditable communication of delivery progress.
